top_signals.title: Oil prices spike over 4% as Iran and Israel trade strikes
top_signals.summary: Oil rises on Monday amid heightened tensions in the Middle East, raising concerns that the conflict may drag on.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Shoots Over $4 as Israel Expands Strikes Against Iran and Lebanon
top_signals.summary: Oil prices jumped more than $4 on Monday, with investors spooked by fresh Israeli strikes on Iran as well as renewed attacks on Lebanon a day earlier.Brent crude futures LCOc1 rose $4.42 or 4.47% to $97.15 a barrel as of 0609 GMT, while U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Reply at VivaTech 2026: Making AI, Agents and Robotics Happen Across the Enterprise
top_signals.summary: Reply [EXM, STAR: REY] is taking part in VivaTech 2026, Europe’s largest innovation and technology event, held from June 17 to 20 at Paris Expo Porte de Versailles. At the event, Reply will showcase its latest innovations around AI for software engineering, AI-powered experiences, data and AI, and industrial AI. This press release features multimedia. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Record Fine Hits Romanian Bank Stocks After Interbank Rate Probe
top_signals.summary: Romania’s largest bank shares tumbled after the nation’s competition watchdog imposed a record fine over alleged collusion in setting money-market rates.

top_signals.title: The great shift to remote work has entered a new normal
top_signals.summary: The share of U.S. workers doing their jobs primarily at home was 2.3 times higher in 2024 than in 2019.
